name: ai-agent-notifier
description: Notifications for Cursor background agents when work finishes or needs attention.

commands.title: Cursor Agent Notifier: Run Self Test
Cursor Agent Notifier: Show Pending Requests
Cursor Agent Notifier: Setup Cursor Webhook
Cursor Agent Notifier: Test Cursor Webhook

agentNotifier.transport.description: Transport used to receive AI agent events.

agentNotifier.httpPort.description: Loopback HTTP port used by the extension.

agentNotifier.relayBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the hosted Cursor relay, for example https://your-relay.example.workers.dev. When set, Cursor webhook setup uses the hosted relay by default.

agentNotifier.cursorWebhookSecret.description: Optional HMAC secret used to verify Cursor background-agent webhooks sent to /cursor/webhook. Set this to the same secret you configure in Cursor.

agentNotifier.watchFilePath.description: Path to the JSON file watched in file transport mode.

agentNotifier.watchResponseFilePath.description: Path written with allow or deny responses in file transport mode.

agentNotifier.soundEnabled.description: Enable notification sounds. macOS uses native system sounds; Windows and Linux use bundled sound files.

agentNotifier.soundVolume.description: Preferred playback volume. Applied to macOS native playback and supported bundled playback commands.

agentNotifier.httpResponseTimeoutMs.description: How long the HTTP transport waits for an allow or deny response.

agentNotifier.permissionReminderEnabled.description: Show repeated in-editor reminders while permission requests remain unanswered.

agentNotifier.permissionReminderInterval.description: How often to repeat the pending permission reminder.
